subtitle: Major Trading Opportunity:
title: Apple Keynote Event
text-1: It’s that time of the year again —  the annual Apple Keynote Event is about to go down and
strong: the world is holding its breath.
text-2: Will Apple introduce any brand-new products? Will there be any game-changing software updates?
blog: Read all about the Event on the IQ Option Blog
text-3: If the new releases exceed the public’s expectations, Apple stock is might soar. However, if the Cupertino geniuses don’t deliver — the opposite could happen.
text-4: Turn this occasion into a trading opportunity with Apple binary options!
